levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I did not understand these letters with numbers.
scenario: You receive a Darija message written with numbers for the first time.
cultureNote: In Moroccan chat, numbers can represent Arabic sounds, so asking is normal.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Please, why do you write with 3?
scenario: You see the number 3 inside a message and want the meaning.
cultureNote: Ask about the symbol, not the whole language at once.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Does this 7 mean the ha sound?
scenario: You are decoding a written message with 7.
cultureNote: 7 is commonly used for the Arabic sound ح in chat writing.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I read the message little by little.
scenario: You are practicing reading a message slowly.
cultureNote: Slow reading is acceptable when learning chat Darija.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Give me one example please.
scenario: You ask a Moroccan friend for a sample message.
cultureNote: One example is often better than a long explanation.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: 3 appears in many words.
scenario: You notice 3 in several WhatsApp words.
cultureNote: The learner should recognize recurring symbols before speaking fast.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: How is 7 pronounced in this word?
scenario: You ask how to pronounce 7 in a specific chat word.
cultureNote: Pronunciation support matters before audio production.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Here 9 looks like qaf.
scenario: You see 9 in a chat spelling and guess the sound.
cultureNote: 9 may represent ق in many Moroccan chat spellings.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
arabic: إلا ما عرفتش نقراها، غادي نسول
english: If I cannot read it, I will ask.
scenario: You decide how to handle unreadable chat Darija.
cultureNote: Asking directly prevents misunderstanding.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Can you write it for me without numbers?
scenario: You ask a friend to simplify the message.
cultureNote: Some Moroccans can rewrite the same phrase in simpler Latin letters.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Where are you now?
scenario: You receive or send a short WhatsApp location message.
cultureNote: Short WhatsApp Darija often drops extra politeness because context is clear.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I am coming now.
scenario: You need to reply quickly before meeting someone.
cultureNote: Simple present movement phrases are common in chat.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me the address.
scenario: You need the address by WhatsApp.
cultureNote: French loanwords like adresse are common in Moroccan daily speech.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Do not take too long on me.
scenario: A friend jokes that you are late.
cultureNote: Use this carefully; it can sound friendly with close people.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, meet there.
scenario: You close a short WhatsApp plan.
cultureNote: Safi closes agreement in many daily messages.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I listened to the message slowly.
scenario: You play a slow voice note to understand it.
cultureNote: Repeating audio is part of listening training.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Repeat the first word for me.
scenario: You understood the message except the first word.
cultureNote: Ask for one segment, not the whole message.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understood only half of the message.
scenario: You report partial understanding honestly.
cultureNote: Partial understanding is a normal bridge to native listening.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Your voice is clear now.
scenario: The speaker records again more clearly.
cultureNote: Audio quality can change meaning in voice notes.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me a slow version please.
scenario: You request a slower voice note.
cultureNote: This is a practical learner request with friends or teachers.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Your voice is a bit low.
scenario: You cannot hear a natural voice note well.
cultureNote: Phone audio issues are common in real WhatsApp use.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I did not hear the last sentence.
scenario: The last part of a voice note is unclear.
cultureNote: Targeting the missing part is better than asking for all again.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Did you say now or tomorrow?
scenario: You need to distinguish timing in a voice note.
cultureNote: Time words are critical in voice messages.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I am with you, continue.
scenario: You signal you are still listening on a call or voice chat.
cultureNote: Short backchannel phrases keep the conversation alive.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understood the idea, thank you.
scenario: You close a natural voice-note exchange.
cultureNote: You do not need every word if you understand the situation.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Speak slowly please.
scenario: Someone in the street speaks too fast.
cultureNote: This is the safest phrase for fast speech.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I did not catch it.
scenario: You miss a fast sentence in a noisy street.
cultureNote: Use this when speed, not language, is the problem.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: What did you say about this place?
scenario: You catch the topic but not the detail.
cultureNote: Ask about the key noun or place.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Sorry, the speech is fast.
scenario: You explain why you need repetition.
cultureNote: Politeness lowers pressure in public.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now it became clear to me.
scenario: After repetition, you understand the sentence.
cultureNote: Confirm understanding so the speaker can continue.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I can read the message now.
scenario: You review reading a Darija chat message.
cultureNote: Celebrate practical reading, not grammar.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understood 3, 7, and 9.
scenario: You summarize the first week skill.
cultureNote: Symbol recognition unlocks many messages.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: If I do not understand, I ask.
scenario: You decide your learner strategy.
cultureNote: Asking is part of real communication.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The message was easy now.
scenario: You reread a message after decoding numbers.
cultureNote: Progress should feel situational.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: We can work with voice now.
scenario: You move from text to voice messages.
cultureNote: Level 11 moves from writing to native sound.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Hi, are you okay?
scenario: You start a quick WhatsApp chat.
cultureNote: Short greetings are normal in daily chat.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I am okay, and you?
scenario: You reply to a greeting.
cultureNote: Mirror the question to keep the chat natural.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Is everything okay?
scenario: You check on a friend briefly.
cultureNote: This phrase is common and warm.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Thank God, just a little late.
scenario: You explain a delay in a casual chat.
cultureNote: A small explanation is polite.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Bye, we will talk later.
scenario: You close the chat.
cultureNote: Short closing avoids leaving the chat hanging.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understood the meaning, not everything.
scenario: A native message has missing or fast parts.
cultureNote: Meaning first is the correct listening goal.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: This seems to be about the appointment.
scenario: You infer the topic from context.
cultureNote: Native listening often begins with topic recognition.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The word I did not understand is...
scenario: You isolate the unknown word.
cultureNote: Isolating one word helps the helper answer quickly.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Does it mean I should come now?
scenario: You check your interpretation.
cultureNote: Confirm before acting on incomplete messages.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, I understood from the context.
scenario: You understand enough from context.
cultureNote: Context is a core skill in real Darija.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Are you joking with me?
scenario: A friend sends a teasing message.
cultureNote: Moroccan joking can be warm but fast.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: ma fhemtsh wach joke wla bssa7
arabic: ما فهمتش واش جوك ولا بصح
english: I did not understand if it is a joke or serious.
scenario: You are unsure about tone.
cultureNote: Ask directly but lightly.
pronunciationParts: ma / fhemtsh / wach / joke / wla / bssa7

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Haha okay, I got you.
scenario: You recognize the joke.
cultureNote: A laugh marker softens the reply.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Do not be upset, I am just asking.
scenario: You repair a tone misunderstanding.
cultureNote: Tone repair is useful in WhatsApp.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Write it clearly so I understand.
scenario: You ask for a clearer version after a joke.
cultureNote: Clarity is better than guessing tone.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: What is he saying in the video?
scenario: You watch a short Moroccan video.
cultureNote: Start by asking for the main sentence.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understood only the first comment.
scenario: You read comments under a video.
cultureNote: Comments can be slangy and compressed.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: This comment is funny.
scenario: You understand a humorous comment.
cultureNote: Media Darija uses humor and exaggeration.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Is this positive or negative?
scenario: You cannot detect comment tone.
cultureNote: Borrowed English/French words appear in chat.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me another easy video.
scenario: You want more practice.
cultureNote: Short clips are good listening drills.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: In the video, how much did he say?
scenario: You watch a market or restaurant clip.
cultureNote: Numbers inside fast speech are high-value listening targets.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I heard the word expensive.
scenario: You catch one key market word.
cultureNote: One word can reveal the situation.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Did he ask for the menu or the bill?
scenario: You distinguish restaurant actions.
cultureNote: Restaurant clips often reuse familiar Level 3 phrases.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
arabic: عاود ليا ديك الجملة ديال السوق
english: Repeat that market sentence for me.
scenario: You need a specific souk line repeated.
cultureNote: Repeating real lines supports reuse.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I understood the situation.
scenario: After key words, you identify the scene.
cultureNote: Scene recognition is more important than perfect translation.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I heard “where do you want?”.
scenario: You recognize a taxi question in a video.
cultureNote: Taxi phrases repeat often in street media.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Did he say right or left?
scenario: You need to catch direction words.
cultureNote: Direction words are critical in real movement.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The line cut in the voice.
scenario: A phone/voice message cuts during a street update.
cultureNote: Connection issues are normal in live communication.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: It looks like the street is busy.
scenario: You describe what you understood from the clip.
cultureNote: Visual context helps listening.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understood where I need to go.
scenario: You extract the useful action from the clip.
cultureNote: The goal is to act correctly, not translate every word.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I heard one word: now.
scenario: You catch only one word inside a fast sentence.
cultureNote: A single timing word can matter.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The middle word was not clear to me.
scenario: You isolate the unclear part.
cultureNote: Native speech blends words together.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
arabic: واش قلتي ماشي ولا ما جيتش؟
english: Did you say “not” or “I did not come”?
scenario: You confuse two similar negative forms.
cultureNote: Negation is important in fast listening.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Can I write what I heard?
scenario: You transcribe a fast sentence for checking.
cultureNote: Dictation turns listening into visible learning.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Correct this word for me.
scenario: You ask for one-word correction.
cultureNote: Focused correction saves time.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Repeat it slowly please.
scenario: You ask for slower repetition.
cultureNote: This is a core Level 11 survival phrase.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me another voice note.
scenario: The first note was unclear.
cultureNote: A new recording may be clearer than the old one.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Write it for me in a message.
scenario: You prefer text after unclear audio.
cultureNote: Switching from audio to text is normal.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Break it for me sentence by sentence.
scenario: The voice note is too long.
cultureNote: Segmentation improves comprehension.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I will listen to it again.
scenario: You replay after clarification.
cultureNote: Repetition is part of the method.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, I will come with you.
scenario: You accept a simple plan by WhatsApp.
cultureNote: Wakha is a useful acceptance word.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I cannot now.
scenario: You decline a request politely.
cultureNote: Short refusal is acceptable if polite.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I will check and answer you.
scenario: You are not ready to decide.
cultureNote: This buys time naturally.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me the details.
scenario: You need more information before replying.
cultureNote: Details may be written in short chat style.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, agreed.
scenario: You confirm the final plan.
cultureNote: This is a clean WhatsApp closing.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I will record a short voice note.
scenario: You choose voice instead of typing.
cultureNote: Voice notes are common and faster than text.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: salam, ana ghadi nji m3a ssa 6
arabic: سلام، أنا غادي نجي مع الساعة 6
english: Hi, I will come around six.
scenario: You record a simple arrival voice note.
cultureNote: Include time clearly in voice notes.
pronunciationParts: salam / ana / ghadi / nji / m3a / ssa / 6

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: If you do not hear me, tell me.
scenario: You warn about audio clarity.
cultureNote: This makes the exchange cooperative.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: That is what I wanted to say.
scenario: You close your short voice note.
cultureNote: A clear ending helps the listener.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I will send again if there is a problem.
scenario: You offer to resend if unclear.
cultureNote: Resending is normal in real audio chat.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Thank you for the invitation.
scenario: You receive an invitation on WhatsApp.
cultureNote: Thanking first is polite.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I can come on Saturday.
scenario: You accept with a specific day.
cultureNote: Give a clear day to avoid confusion.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me the exact time.
scenario: You need the exact time for the invitation.
cultureNote: Exact time prevents missed visits.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: ila kan mumkin, nji m3a sa7bi
arabic: إلا كان ممكن، نجي مع صاحبي
english: If possible, I will come with my friend.
scenario: You ask permission to bring someone.
cultureNote: Ask before bringing another person.
pronunciationParts: ila / kan / mumkin / nji / m3a / sa7bi

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: If I cannot, I will call you.
scenario: You give a fallback plan.
cultureNote: Calling is stronger than a late unclear message.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Sorry, the appointment was postponed.
scenario: You receive a cancellation or postponement message.
cultureNote: Postponement phrases are common in practical life.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: So today is no longer happening?
scenario: You confirm cancellation.
cultureNote: Confirm before changing your plan.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Tomorrow at the same time?
scenario: You ask about the new appointment.
cultureNote: Short questions are enough in WhatsApp.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Give me a new date.
scenario: You need a new date after cancellation.
cultureNote: French/English loanwords can appear in planning.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, we will change the plan.
scenario: You accept the change.
cultureNote: Being flexible keeps the exchange friendly.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Send me the location.
scenario: You ask for a map pin.
cultureNote: French location terms are common in Moroccan phone use.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Is it near the tram?
scenario: You understand a location message and ask landmark.
cultureNote: Landmarks are often easier than street names.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I am near the shop.
scenario: You describe your current location.
cultureNote: Small shops are common reference points.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I did not find the address.
scenario: You are lost after receiving a location.
cultureNote: A call can solve address confusion faster.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I understood the way.
scenario: You understand the route after clarification.
cultureNote: Close the exchange when action is clear.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: n9ra w nsm3 f nafs lwa9t
english: I read and listen at the same time.
scenario: You combine chat text with a voice note.
cultureNote: Text plus audio builds native listening.
pronunciationParts: n9ra / w / nsm3 / f / nafs / lwa9t

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The message is becoming clear to me now.
scenario: You review progress after several days.
cultureNote: Confidence matters in Level 11.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: If the voice is fast, I split it.
scenario: You apply a listening strategy.
cultureNote: Segmenting is better than panic.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: If the writing is hard, I ask.
scenario: You apply a chat strategy.
cultureNote: Asking is not failure.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I can answer simply.
scenario: You can reply after listening.
cultureNote: Simple replies keep real conversation moving.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, enough.
scenario: You hear a common closing expression.
cultureNote: Can be neutral or firm depending on tone.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: It is okay / never mind.
scenario: Someone minimizes a small problem.
cultureNote: Often used to soften mistakes.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Enjoy it / good for you.
scenario: You see someone receive food or buy something.
cultureNote: This phrase is social, not just literal health.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: May God protect you.
scenario: You hear a warm protective expression.
cultureNote: Religious expressions can be daily social warmth.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: So, let’s go.
scenario: Someone moves the conversation to action.
cultureNote: Iwa often marks transition.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: This speech is a little different.
scenario: You notice a different city accent.
cultureNote: Darija varies by city and region.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: wach f had lblasa kaygoloha hakka?
english: Do they say it like this in this place?
scenario: You ask about regional usage.
cultureNote: Regional curiosity is useful.
pronunciationParts: wach / f / had / lblasa / kaygoloha / hakka

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
arabic: أنا معود على دارجة ديال كازا
english: I am used to Casablanca Darija.
scenario: You explain your listening base.
cultureNote: Naming your base helps helpers adjust.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Give me the same meaning with another word.
scenario: A regional word blocks understanding.
cultureNote: Synonyms help across accents.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I know the difference.
scenario: You understand the regional variant.
cultureNote: Notice difference without judging it.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I will reply to you later.
scenario: You cannot answer immediately.
cultureNote: It is better to say later than ignore.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I cannot talk now.
scenario: You are busy or in public.
cultureNote: A clear boundary is polite.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: khllini nsm3 lvoice f blasa haniya
english: Let me listen to the voice note in a quiet place.
scenario: You avoid answering before understanding.
cultureNote: Listening carefully prevents wrong replies.
pronunciationParts: khllini / nsm3 / lvoice / f / blasa / haniya

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I do not want to answer wrongly.
scenario: You explain delayed response.
cultureNote: Accuracy can matter more than speed.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I will confirm and get back to you.
scenario: You need to verify information.
cultureNote: Common in practical planning.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
dayTitle: التعامل مع سوء فهم في رسالة
english: Sorry, I understood you wrongly.
scenario: You realize you misread a message.
cultureNote: Apologize simply and correct.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
dayTitle: التعامل مع سوء فهم في رسالة
english: I meant something else.
scenario: Your message was misunderstood.
cultureNote: Clarify intent, not only words.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
dayTitle: التعامل مع سوء فهم في رسالة
english: I will explain it another way.
scenario: You repair a confusing message.
cultureNote: Rephrasing is normal in chat.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
dayTitle: التعامل مع سوء فهم في رسالة
english: Are you upset?
scenario: You check if tone caused a problem.
cultureNote: Tone checking can prevent tension.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
dayTitle: التعامل مع سوء فهم في رسالة
english: Okay, let’s start again.
scenario: You reset the conversation after confusion.
cultureNote: A friendly reset saves the relationship.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I am still learning Darija.
scenario: You tell a native speaker your level.
cultureNote: People often help when they understand you are learning.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Speak with me slowly.
scenario: You ask for learner-friendly speech.
cultureNote: Simple learner requests are useful.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: If I make a mistake, correct me.
scenario: You invite correction.
cultureNote: This turns every chat into practice.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: bghit nt3lm lhdra dyal kul nhar
arabic: بغيت نتعلم الهضرة ديال كل نهار
english: I want to learn everyday speech.
scenario: You explain your learning goal.
cultureNote: Level 11 is about real-life language.
pronunciationParts: bghit / nt3lm / lhdra / dyal / kul / nhar

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Thank you for your patience.
scenario: You thank someone helping you learn.
cultureNote: Gratitude keeps helpers motivated.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: had lmessage kay3ni shno khasni ndir?
arabic: هاد الميساج كيعني شنو خاصني ندير؟
english: What does this message mean I should do?
scenario: You turn a message into an action.
cultureNote: Action understanding is the Darija30 goal.
pronunciationParts: had / lmessage / kay3ni / shno / khasni / ndir

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The situation is the appointment.
scenario: You identify the real-life scene behind the message.
cultureNote: Name the scene before translating words.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: lfi3l li khasni ndir howa nji
arabic: الفعل اللي خاصني ندير هو نجي
english: The action I need to do is come.
scenario: You extract the action from a message.
cultureNote: Action extraction helps real communication.
pronunciationParts: lfi3l / li / khasni / ndir / howa / nji

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: lmessage fih talab, mashi ghir khbar
arabic: الميساج فيه طلب، ماشي غير خبر
english: The message has a request, not just information.
scenario: You distinguish message purpose.
cultureNote: Purpose matters: request, info, joke, warning, invitation.
pronunciationParts: lmessage / fih / talab / mashi / ghir / khbar

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I will answer the situation.
scenario: You reply based on the scene.
cultureNote: Reply to the situation, not isolated words.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Hello, can you hear me?
scenario: You start a short voice call.
cultureNote: Call openings are direct.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Are you still with me?
scenario: The call becomes silent.
cultureNote: This phrase is common during unstable calls.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: The network is a bit weak.
scenario: The call quality is poor.
cultureNote: Network explanations are common in phone Darija.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I will call you later.
scenario: You cannot continue the call.
cultureNote: Calling later is clearer than staying unclear.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Okay, we heard each other.
scenario: You close the quick voice exchange.
cultureNote: Close calls with confirmation and goodbye.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I understand the topic before the words.
scenario: You review native listening strategy.
cultureNote: Topic first is a real listening skill.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I find the important words.
scenario: You identify keywords in fast audio.
cultureNote: Keywords unlock meaning.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I distinguish joke from serious tone.
scenario: You review tone skills.
cultureNote: Tone is a social listening skill.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I answer with a small sentence.
scenario: You keep native conversation going.
cultureNote: Short replies are enough at this stage.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I still need native QA.
scenario: You mark the level as draft before audio.
cultureNote: Draft content must be checked before recording.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I read the message with 3, 7, and 9.
scenario: Final test: you read an Arabizi-style message.
cultureNote: This proves chat decoding.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I listened to the voice note and understood the idea.
scenario: Final test: you understand a real voice note.
cultureNote: Understanding the idea is the main target.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
friendlyLatin: shft video w l9it lklma lmohimma
arabic: شفت فيديو و لقيت الكلمة المهمة
english: I watched a video and found the key word.
scenario: Final test: you find a key word in a clip.
cultureNote: Media listening uses visual context plus keywords.
pronunciationParts: shft / video / w / l9it / lklma / lmohimma

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: I answered with a small Darija phrase.
scenario: Final test: you send a simple reply.
cultureNote: Small reply beats silence.

levelNameArabic: الفهم الحقيقي: واتساب والإعلام والكلام السريع
english: Now I can enter real media.
scenario: Final close: you are ready for real short media.
cultureNote: Level 11 prepares the learner for full simulation.
